creator: pho@FreeBSD.org
text:
The test uses a memory disk.
This is basically what the test does:

for i in `jot 8`; do
        while [ -f $cont ]; do
                for u in md${u1}p2 md${u1}p3; do
                        gmirror forget test
                        gmirror remove test $u
                        gmirror insert test $u
                done 2>/dev/null
        done &
done
